Package com.gpudb

Class GPUdbBase.JsonOptions

java.lang.Object
com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.JsonOptions
Enclosing class:
GPUdbBase
public static final class GPUdbBase.JsonOptions extends Object
This class provides options to control JSON ingest using BulkInserter. By default, for performance reasons VALIDATE_JSON is set to false and COMPRESSION_ON set to true
